text:
(M0610) Physical Aggression Behaviors demonstrated at least once a week: physical aggression. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0610_BD_VERBAL (M0610) Verbal disruption Behaviors demonstrated at least once a week: verbal disruption. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0620_BEH_PROB_FRQ (M0620) Frequency of Behavior Problems Frequency of behavior problems. 00 = Never
01 = Less than once a month
02 = Once a month
03 = Several times each month
04 = Several times a week
05 = At least daily. CHAR 2 x
